criteria.reason: Shared shell, page, and state styling now present a denser technical UI across the main visible screens.
The refresh is centered in shared primitives in style.css with only targeted app.js markup helpers.
Information hierarchy, code-like surfaces, and file/search presentation are materially improved without flow changes.
No backend/API changes were made and local JS, import, and unit checks all passed on the current repo state.
Spec, evidence, raw logs, and verification artifacts were updated in .agent/tasks/ui-tech-refresh/ with risks noted.
